steps.title: Effect on median
steps.content: Adding 46 to each value shifts the median by 46. $$\text{median}_B = \text{median}_A + 46$$ Since 46 > 0, $$\text{median}_B > \text{median}_A.$$

steps.title: Effect on range and conclusion
steps.content: Adding a constant to every data point does not affect the range, so $$\text{range}_B = \text{range}_A.$$ Together with the median increase from step 1, this corresponds to choice A — A is correct.
